auth.forgot_subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
auth.reset_code_sent_desc: A reset code has been sent to your email address.
auth.reset_subtitle: Enter the code sent by email ({{email}}) and your new password.
auth.reset_success_desc: Your password has been reset successfully.
auth.reset_sent: A reset email has been sent.
auth.terms: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service.
auth.google_not_configured_android: Google Sign-In is not configured for Android.
auth.google_unavailable_dev: Google Sign-In is not available in development mode (Expo Go). Use email/password or test via TestFlight.
auth.google_sha1_mismatch:
Google sign-in blocked: your APK SHA-1 fingerprint is not registered in Google Cloud.

1. Run in terminal: npm run android:sha1
2. Google Cloud Console > Credentials > Android OAuth client
3. Package: com.deadpions.app
4. Add the displayed SHA-1 (keep the production one too)
5. Wait 5–10 min, then try again
auth.apple_login_failed: Unable to sign in with Apple
auth.apple_service_unavailable: Apple sign-in is not yet available on the server.
auth.error_email_taken: This email address is already in use.
auth.error_weak_password: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.login_required_friends: Log in to play with friends.
auth.login_required_search: Log in to search for a player.
auth.session_expired_desc: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

shop.title: Shop
shop.iap_no_window_message:
If no purchase window appears:

Common causes:
- In-App Purchase product unavailable (sandbox / country / device)
- In-App Purchases disabled (Screen Time)
- App Store connection issue

Please try again in a moment.

shop.login_to_restore: Log in to restore your purchases.

shop.restore_error: Unable to restore your purchases. Please try again.

shop.subscription_coming_soon: You chose the {{plan}} plan. This feature will soon be available with real payments.
